title: fix(scenarios): load orphan rows with null pum_scenarioconfigjson
body:
## Summary

- **Orphan-scenario fix**: scenarios whose `pum_scenarioconfigjson` is `null` (six rows on the dev tenant — Alpha, Demo Scenario - Biopharma 2025, Epsilon, Gamma, gdfg, Quarterly Planning i April) used to surface "may have been deleted" when opened in CompareModal even though they listed fine. `parseBlob` now treats absent/empty content as an empty blob (defaults fill in); genuinely corrupt JSON strings still return `null`.
- **demo.json follow-up**: Data Warehouse Modernization `durationDays` 351 → 349 (raw end − start for the post-reshape 2026-09-01 → 2027-08-16 window is 349). Reviewer follow-up to #48.

## Diagnosis

Confirmed against live Dataverse via `dev:dataverse`: the six "broken" rows have `pum_scenarioconfigjson = null` and the rest of their scalar columns are also null — orphan rows from earlier versions or partial saves. The list query only `$select`s id/name/savedAt so they appear in the dropdown; the load query pulls configJson and `rowToScenario` returned `null`, triggering the misleading error.

## Test plan

- [x] New unit spec `tests/adapters/xrmScenarioStore.orphanLoad.spec.ts` — 3 cases (null, empty string, corrupt non-JSON string).
- [x] `npm run verify` green (lint, format, typecheck, 563/563 tests, build, bundle-size, bans, parity-coverage, secrets, unused, arch).
- [x] Reopened the Compare dialog against live Dataverse via the dev:dataverse server — Alpha now loads with default empty state and diffs cleanly against kra.
